016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.wallet;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
019import org.bitcoinj.crypto.HDPath;
020import org.bitcoinj.crypto.ChildNumber;
021
022import static org.bitcoinj.base.ScriptType.P2PKH;
023import static org.bitcoinj.base.ScriptType.P2WPKH;
024
025/**
026 * Path builder that supports BIP44, BIP84, etc. This functionality will be in the next release of bitcoinj.
027 * This interface will be deprecated after the next release of bitcoinj.
028 * @deprecated Use {@link org.bitcoinj.wallet.KeyChainGroupStructure#BIP43} and constants in {@link org.bitcoinj.wallet.DeterministicKeyChain}
029 */
030@Deprecated
031public interface BipStandardKeyChainGroupStructure {
032    ChildNumber PURPOSE_BIP44 = ChildNumber.PURPOSE_BIP44;  // P2PKH
033    ChildNumber PURPOSE_BIP49 = ChildNumber.PURPOSE_BIP49;  // P2WPKH-nested-in-P2SH
034    ChildNumber PURPOSE_BIP84 = ChildNumber.PURPOSE_BIP84;  // P2WPKH
035
036    ChildNumber COINTYPE_BTC = ChildNumber.COINTYPE_BTC;
037    ChildNumber COINTYPE_TBTC = new ChildNumber(1, true);
038
039    ChildNumber CHANGE_RECEIVING = ChildNumber.ZERO;
040    ChildNumber CHANGE_CHANGE = ChildNumber.ONE;
041
042    HDPath BIP44_PARENT = HDPath.BIP44_PARENT;
043    HDPath BIP84_PARENT = HDPath.BIP84_PARENT;
044
045
046    /**
047     * Map desired output script type and account index to an account path
048     * @param outputScriptType output script type (purpose)
049     * @param netId network/coin type
050     * @return The HD Path: purpose / coinType / accountIndex
051     */
052    static HDPath pathFor(org.bitcoinj.base.ScriptType outputScriptType, String netId) {
053        return purpose(outputScriptType)
054                .extend(coinType(netId), account(0));
055    }
056
057    /**
058     * Return the (root) path containing "purpose" for the specified scriptType
059     * @param scriptType script/address type
060     * @return An HDPath with a BIP44 "purpose" entry
061     */
062    static HDPath purpose(org.bitcoinj.base.ScriptType scriptType) {
063        if (scriptType == null || scriptType == P2PKH) {
064            return BIP44_PARENT;
065        } else if (scriptType == P2WPKH) {
066            return BIP84_PARENT;
067        } else {
068            throw new IllegalArgumentException(scriptType.toString());
069        }
070    }
071
072    /**
073     * Return coin type path component for a network id
074     * @param networkId network id string, eg. {@link BitcoinNetwork#ID_MAINNET}
075     */
076    static ChildNumber coinType(String networkId) {
077        BitcoinNetwork network = BitcoinNetwork.fromIdString(networkId)
078                .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException("Unknown network id (coin type)"));
079        switch (network) {
080            case MAINNET:
081                return COINTYPE_BTC;
082            case TESTNET:
083                return COINTYPE_TBTC;
084            case SIGNET:
085                return COINTYPE_TBTC;
086            case REGTEST:
087            default:
088                return COINTYPE_TBTC;
089        }
090    }
091
092    /**
093     * Return path component for an account
094     * @param accountIndex account index
095     * @return A hardened path component
096     */
097    static ChildNumber account(int accountIndex) {
098        return new ChildNumber(accountIndex, true);
099    }
100}
